# CPE Pricing (Rod)

```sql
use DataWarehouse
go
/*
Watch for discontinued dates, and alternative customers
*/

SELECT p.ID	
	, [description]
--	, SELLING_UM
	--, CREATE_DATE
	--, EFFECTIVE_DATE
	--, DISCONTINUE_DATE
	, '' DEFAULT_UNIT_PRICE
--	, CUSTOMER_ID 
	, UDF36.STRING_VAL AS ALLOY
	, UDF37.NUMBER_VAL AS [LENGTH]
	, UDF38.NUMBER_VAL AS [WIDTH]
	, UDF39.NUMBER_VAL AS [THICKNESS]

FROM part p
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF36
-- ALLOY
	ON UDF36.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF36.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'
	AND UDF36.ID = 'UDF-0000036'
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF39
-- THICKNESS
	ON UDF39.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF39.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'
	AND UDF39.ID = 'UDF-0000039'
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF38
-- WIDTH
	ON UDF38.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF38.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'
	AND UDF38.ID = 'UDF-0000038'
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF37
-- LENGTH
	ON UDF37.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF37.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'
	AND UDF37.ID = 'UDF-0000037'
WHERE p.id in ('100T1430-87', '100T1430-89', '100T1435-3', '100T1435-6', '100T1435-7', '100T1435-8', '100T1482-77', '100T1482-78', '110T3215-34', '110U0118-1', '110U0118-2', '110U0123-1', /*
SELECT p.ID	
	, [description]
--	, SELLING_UM
	--, CREATE_DATE
	--, EFFECTIVE_DATE
	--, DISCONTINUE_DATE
	, DEFAULT_UNIT_PRICE
--	, CUSTOMER_ID 
	, UDF36.STRING_VAL AS ALLOY
	, UDF37.NUMBER_VAL AS [LENGTH]
	, UDF38.NUMBER_VAL AS [WIDTH]
	, UDF39.NUMBER_VAL AS [THICKNESS]

from part p
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF36
-- ALLOY
	ON UDF36.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF36.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'
	AND UDF36.ID = 'UDF-0000036'
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF39
-- THICKNESS
	ON UDF39.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF39.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'
	AND UDF39.ID = 'UDF-0000039'
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF38
-- WIDTH
	ON UDF38.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF38.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'
	AND UDF38.ID = 'UDF-0000038'
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF37
-- LENGTH
	ON UDF37.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF37.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'

SELECT PART_ID
	, BASE_ID
	, LOT_ID
	, SPLIT_ID
	, SUB_ID
	, DESIRED_WANT_DATE
	, [STATUS]
	, CLOSE_DATE
	, DESIRED_QTY
	, [ACT_MATERIAL_COST] + [ACT_LABOR_COST] + [ACT_BURDEN_COST] + [ACT_SERVICE_COST] AS TOTALACTUALCOST
	, ([ACT_MATERIAL_COST] + [ACT_LABOR_COST] + [ACT_BURDEN_COST] + [ACT_SERVICE_COST])/DESIRED_QTY AS AVGACTUALCOST
FROM WORK_ORDER
WHERE PART_ID IN ('100T1435-1', '100T1435-2', '112T1350-501', '113T1636-73', '113T1636-74', '113U0107-11', '140T0111-15', '140T0748-105', '140T2101-4126', '140T2101U27', '140T2102-319', '140T2103-2571', '140T2502-27', '140T2523-16', '141T8210-9991', '141T8210-9992', '144U3302-22', '145T3016-905', '146T0063-5', '146T1033-175', '146T1033-9148', '146T5008-45', '146T5011-125', '146U7266-159', '212U3415-9003', '212U3415-9013', '213T4142-3', '213T7450-43', '214T6010-1', '214T6010-2', '232A2203-3', '232A4442-10', '232N4337-1', '255T4817-1', '256T3030-3', '284T0890Y6', '287T0020-249', '287T3651-1', '287T4137-52', '287T4505-205', '287T4505-206', '287W4609-7', '287W4617-68', '411N2052-3', '413A3009-13C', '413A3009-287H', '413A3009-292B', '414T3230-349', '417T5070-15', '417T5070-31', '452T3231-2', '453T1743-1', '459Z1003-6104', '472W3103-10', '472W3103-9', '481Z5140-33', '481Z5140-35', '629Z2790-1367', '629Z2790-1379', '654Z4700-15-802', '654Z4700-33-801', '654Z4700-33-803', '654Z4700-33-805', '654Z4700-33-807', '658Z1301-102', '658Z1301-103', '658Z1301-202', '658Z1301-203', '658Z1301-204', '658Z1301-21', '65B18069-5', '671Z1507-21', '671Z1507-22', '678Z2000-123', '678Z4721-17', '678Z4722-18', '678Z4751-45', '69B55874-3', '69B62091-2', '824Z2387-208', '843Z1502-138', '843Z1502-139', '843Z6130-2407', '843Z6130-2409')
	AND TYPE = 'W'

ORDER BY PART_ID, BASE_ID
```
